sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_d8bdc5a847c64310689a1a2f316d43f9
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2145596_vendor_0_vendor_contract</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Auto Generate Contract Number</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    var gr = new GlideRecord('x_2145596_vendor_0_vendor_contract');
    gr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on');
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    if (gr.next() && gr.contract_number) {

        var lastNumber = gr.contract_number.toString();
        var num = parseInt(lastNumber.replace("VC", ""), 10);

        current.contract_number = "VC" + ("0000" + (num + 1)).slice(-4);

    } else {

        current.contract_number = "VC0001";

    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-09 18:15:07</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>d8bdc5a847c64310689a1a2f316d43f9</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Auto Generate Contract Number</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Vendor Contract Compliance &amp; Renewal Management" source="x_2145596_vendor_0">8890502047024310689a1a2f316d4331</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Vendor Contract Compliance &amp; Renewal Management">8890502047024310689a1a2f316d4331</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_d8bdc5a847c64310689a1a2f316d43f9</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-09 18:15:07</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=d8bdc5a847c64310689a1a2f316d43f9"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_f6f3e79293110210ff43ac29848918e4
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>false</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>pa_indicators</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="pa_indicators">is_mlb_enabledVALCHANGES^is_mlb_enabled=true^EQ<item endquery="false" field="is_mlb_enabled" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="VALCHANGES" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="false" field="is_mlb_enabled" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="true"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>PA ULB Conversion on Enable</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/ ) {
	insertOrUpdateDSStatusToInProgress(current.sys_id);
    SNC.PAMLBConversion.enableMLBForAutomatedAndFormulaIndicators([current.sys_id]);
})(current, previous);

function insertOrUpdateDSStatusToInProgress(indicatorSysId) {
	var DS_IN_PROGRESS = "3";
	var gr = new GlideRecord("pa_indicator_data_snapshot_status");
	if(gr.get("indicator", indicatorSysId)) {
		gr.setValue("data_snapshot_status", DS_IN_PROGRESS);
		gr.update();
		return;
	}
	gr.initialize();
	gr.setValue("indicator", indicatorSysId);
	gr.setValue("data_snapshot_status", DS_IN_PROGRESS);
	gr.insert();
}]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2024-04-04 00:11:26</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>f6f3e79293110210ff43ac29848918e4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>PA ULB Conversion on Enable</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Data Snapshots" source="com.snc.pa.mlb">45d31f9047020310689a1a2f316d43cb</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_f6f3e79293110210ff43ac29848918e4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-10 09:00:25</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=f6f3e79293110210ff43ac29848918e4"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_d8a28e7c474ec310689a1a2f316d43ed
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2145596_vendor_0_vendor_contract</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Set Renewal Status</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    // Prefer Renewal Date. If it is empty, use End Date.
    var targetDate = current.renewal_date;

    if (gs.nil(targetDate)) {
        targetDate = current.end_date;
    }

    // If neither date exists, do nothing.
    if (gs.nil(targetDate)) {
        return;
    }

    var today = new GlideDate();

    var compareDate = new GlideDate();
    compareDate.setValue(targetDate);

    // Define the renewal warning window (30 days from today).
    var renewalWindow = new GlideDate();
    renewalWindow.setValue(today);
    renewalWindow.addDaysLocalTime(30);

    if (compareDate.before(today)) {

        current.renewal_status = 'expired';

    } else if (compareDate.before(renewalWindow) || compareDate.equals(renewalWindow)) {

        current.renewal_status = 'renewal_due';

    } else {

        current.renewal_status = 'active';

    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-10 16:53:09</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>d8a28e7c474ec310689a1a2f316d43ed</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Set Renewal Status</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Vendor Contract Compliance &amp; Renewal Management" source="x_2145596_vendor_0">8890502047024310689a1a2f316d4331</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Vendor Contract Compliance &amp; Renewal Management">8890502047024310689a1a2f316d4331</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_d8a28e7c474ec310689a1a2f316d43ed</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-16 15:59:14</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=d8a28e7c474ec310689a1a2f316d43ed"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_fca655124786cf10689a1a2f316d43bb
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2145596_vendor_0_vendor_renewal_tasks</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="x_2145596_vendor_0_vendor_renewal_tasks">renewal_decision!=pending^renewal_decisionVALCHANGES^renewal_requested=false^EQ<item display_value="Pending" endquery="false" field="renewal_decision" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="!=" or="false" value="pending"/><item display_value="-- None --" endquery="false" field="renewal_decision" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="VALCHANGES" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="false" field="renewal_requested" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="false"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Process Renewal Decision</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    // Update Renewal Task
    current.renewal_requested = true;
    current.processed_by = gs.getUserID();
    current.completion_date = new GlideDateTime();
    current.state = 'closed';

    // Update Vendor Contract
    var contract = new GlideRecord("x_2145596_vendor_0_vendor_contract");

    if (contract.get(current.vendor_contract.toString())) {

        if (current.renewal_decision == "renew") {

            contract.renewal_status = "renewed";

        } else if (current.renewal_decision == "do_not_renew") {

            contract.renewal_status = "expired";

        }

        contract.update();
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-15 05:27:25</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>fca655124786cf10689a1a2f316d43bb</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Process Renewal Decision</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Vendor Contract Compliance &amp; Renewal Management" source="x_2145596_vendor_0">8890502047024310689a1a2f316d4331</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Vendor Contract Compliance &amp; Renewal Management">8890502047024310689a1a2f316d4331</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_fca655124786cf10689a1a2f316d43bb</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-15 05:48:51</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=fca655124786cf10689a1a2f316d43bb"/></record_update>
